shortDescription: An occupied home in Temecula's Temeku Hills, edited and elevated for the listing without disrupting the family's daily routine.
longDescription: A discreet occupied-staging project on a fairway-facing lot, working with the homeowner's existing furniture and adding curated accessories, art, and styling layers to translate the home cleanly to the listing photography. Black dining surfaces, brass details, and seasonal florals tied the spaces together while staying respectful of the family's daily flow.
